Tumbling Creek Preserve Trails, Gainesville, GA 30504, USA

Numerous mature flowering quince produce fruit here throughout the vast swaths of Chinese privet. Locate in early spring by flowers and return summer to get fruit. Also found 1 loaded plum tree. Access: Public.
About 5 wild elderberries in margin of neighborhood accessible from road. Decent fruit yields but high seed to flesh ratio. Access: Public.
